info.name: BAZM Cafe Backend API
info.description:
Import this collection AND BAZM_Cafe_Backend.local.postman_environment.json.

Suggested order: Health → Auth login → Staff → Settings → Customers → Tables → Categories → Products → Guest TAKEAWAY → Orders ops → Payments.

For dine-in tableToken run: npx tsx scripts/create-postman-table.ts and paste values into the environment.

item.name: Reset tax and service charge to 0
